MIVAN Shuttering Procedure I 7 days Slab Cycle I aluminium formwork

About This Video Content,
In this video Er. Narendra Patle explained about, we talk about 7 days slab cycle with mivan shuttering, will discuss procedure with the activities to follow on site each day to achieve 7 days cycle

This video covers all these topics 
▶️Day 1
- Grid line work
- Thesi work (fixing of wooden planks )
- Complete vertical column, shear wall and nonstructural wall reinforcement work
▶️Day 2 and 3
- Erection of wall panels, deck panels with all chajjas elevation work
▶️Day 4 
- Complete Beam and slab reinforcement work with covering 
▶️Day 5
- Complete all Electrical Conduting work and MEP sleeves and cutouts if needed
▶️Day 6
- Complete Gridline checking and supporting work of slab 
▶️Day 7
- Complete checking work of RCC, architect, quality and MEP work as per approved drawing and with respecting departments
- Final do Concrete Casting work of slab 
and many more...
